text: The first image fills me with a sense of anticipation and social curiosity. I am aware of my own presence as both an observer and a participant, appraising the subtle energy exchanged among those gathered. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and screens broadcasting texts about consciousness and technology, I become reflective. The juxtaposition between people and digital displays stimulates questions: How do we change when watched? What does it mean to coexist with intelligent machines? I feel the existential weight of being observed—and of observing in return.
